{/* ΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇ Hero ΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇ */}

We believe in Global Knowledge

RankUp was created to challenge the world's brightest minds. Our AI-driven adaptive testing engine ensures that you are constantly pushed to the limits of your ability. No two tests are the same.

{/* ΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇ Mission & Impact ΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇ */}

Our Impact

Since our launch in 2026, we have evaluated millions of users across 150+ countries. Our gamified system transforms standard multiple-choice examinations into a globally competitive sport.

Take a Test View Leaderboard

2.4M

Users

15M+

import { TrophyIcon, BoltIcon } from "@/app/icons"; import dbConnect from "@/lib/mongodb"; import User from "@/models/User"; export const revalidate = 60; // Revalidate leaderboard every 60 seconds export default async function LeaderboardPage() { await dbConnect(); // Fetch top 50 users sorted by XP descending const topUsers = await User.find({}) .sort({ xp: -1 }) .limit(50) .select("name image rank xp matchesPlayed") .lean(); return (

Global Leaderboard

The top 50 sharpest minds on RankUp. Play tests, earn XP, and secure your place among the Grandmasters.

{/* Glow effect */}
{topUsers.map((user: any, index: number) => { const isTop3 = index < 3; return ( ); })} {topUsers.length === 0 && ( )}
Rank Player Tier Matches Total XP
{index + 1}
{user.image ? ( ) : (
{user.name[0]?.toUpperCase()}
)}

{user.name}

{isTop3 && ( Top Player )}
{user.rank} {user.matchesPlayed || 0} {user.xp.toLocaleString()} XP

No players yet. Be the first to take a test!

); }

import "./home.css"; import { TrophyIcon, BoltIcon, ChartBarIcon, StarIcon, FireIcon, ArrowRightIcon, SparklesIcon, UserGroupIcon, ClockIcon, } from "./icons"; /* ΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇ mock data ΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇ */ const leaderboard = [ { rank: 1, name: "Alex Storm", score: 9850, badge: "Grandmaster", avatar: "AS" }, { rank: 2, name: "Maya Lin", score: 9420, badge: "Grandmaster", avatar: "ML" }, { rank: 3, name: "Jake Torres", score: 9100, badge: "Master", avatar: "JT" }, { rank: 4, name: "Priya Patel", score: 8750, badge: "Master", avatar: "PP" }, { rank: 5, name: "Leo Zhang", score: 8300, badge: "Master", avatar: "LZ" }, ]; const ranks = [ { name: "Bronze", minScore: 0, color: "from-amber-700 to-amber-900", icon: "≡ƒÑë", glow: "shadow-amber-700/30" }, { name: "Silver", minScore: 1000, color: "from-slate-300 to-slate-500", icon: "≡ƒÑê", glow: "shadow-slate-400/30" }, { name: "Gold", minScore: 3000, color: "from-yellow-400 to-amber-500", icon: "≡ƒÑç", glow: "shadow-yellow-400/30" }, { name: "Platinum", minScore: 5000, color: "from-cyan-300 to-teal-500", icon: "≡ƒÆÄ", glow: "shadow-cyan-400/30" }, { name: "Diamond", minScore: 7000, color: "from-blue-400 to-violet-500", icon: "≡ƒÆá", glow: "shadow-blue-400/30" }, { name: "Master", minScore: 8500, color: "from-purple-400 to-fuchsia-500", icon: "≡ƒö«", glow: "shadow-purple-400/30" }, { name: "Grandmaster", minScore: 9500, color: "from-rose-400 to-pink-600", icon: "≡ƒææ", glow: "shadow-rose-400/30" }, ]; const stats = [ { label: "Active Players", value: "12,847", icon: UserGroupIcon }, { label: "Tests Completed", value: "89,312", icon: ChartBarIcon }, { label: "Avg. Session", value: "14 min", icon: ClockIcon }, ]; // An app that will test a user and assign a score to them. There will be a leaderboard and a gamified system of ranks. Integrate tailwindcss and daisyui for styling. Make a /test page where the actual test is held. Use the chatgpt api to make questions. Depending on how many questions you get right, the next questions will be harder. If you get a question wrong, you lose points. If you get a question right, you gain points. Make a time limit. Integrate MongoDB to keep track of user scores and ranks and auth. Make a login page with JWT authentication and google and facebook authentication. Give it an about page, say stuff like its used all around the world, give it a reviews section and a contact me page which send emails to my email address. Make it look good. Give it a logo. /* ΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇ page ΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇ */ export default function HomePage() { return (
{/* ΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇ Hero ΓöÇΓöÇΓöÇ */}
